channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Voters in Assam prioritise welfare schemes over grievances on Zubeen Garg’s death
item.description: In Assam, the death of beloved singer Zubeen Garg by drowning in Singapore in September has sparked widespread mourning and protests, with many citizens questioning the state government's handling of ...

item.title: Bangladesh battles measles outbreak as nearly 100 children die
item.description: Bangladesh is facing a serious public health challenge as a suspected measles outbreak has reportedly claimed the lives of about 98 children over the past three weeks. The Health Ministry reported tha...

item.title: Motorcyclist dies in Scarborough collision
item.description: A tragic traffic accident occurred in Scarborough, Toronto, resulting in the death of a 21-year-old motorcyclist. The incident took place on a busy roadway, prompting a response from local emergency s...

item.title: Mbavu Destroyer Loses to Majembe in Emotional Boxing Match at Kasarani
item.description: The much-anticipated boxing bout between amateur fighters Majembe and Mbavu Destroyer at Kasarani Indoor Arena ended dramatically in the fourth round. Majembe won by technical knockout after a controv...

item.title: NSW Government Investigated for Alleged Racial Discrimination by Human Rights Commission
item.description: The Australian Human Rights Commission has opened an investigation into a complaint against Steve Kamper, the NSW Minister for Multiculturalism, and his department over alleged racial discrimination t...

item.title: UK benefits and state pension rise as two-child cap is abolished
item.description: As the new financial year begins, several UK benefits and the state pension are set to increase. Most notably, the two-child limit on universal credit has been removed, meaning around 480,000 families...

item.title: Trump Contemplates Select Cabinet Changes Amid Growing Iran War Pressures
item.description: US President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a broader reshuffle of his cabinet following the recent dismissal of Attorney General Pam Bondi. Sources close to White House deliberations indicate...

item.title: Albanese's Government Faces Challenges in Economic and Supply Chain Resilience
item.description: The article critiques Prime Minister Anthony Albanese's handling of Australia's economic and supply chain resilience over the past four years. Drawing a parallel with former Prime Minister Gough Whitl...

item.title: B.C. boy celebrates fifth birthday at local recycling centre
item.description: In Maple Ridge, B.C., five-year-old Himmat Rai celebrated his birthday in a truly unique way — at the local recycling centre. Unlike most children who might choose a party at a park or a play centre, ...

item.title: Durban man jailed for 25 years after attempting to murder his young nephew
item.description: A 27-year-old man in Durban has been sentenced to 25 years’ direct imprisonment for the attempted murder of his nine-year-old nephew. The incident occurred on 3 January 2024, when the accused lured th...

item.title: Metro Manila Fuel Prices Remain High Amid Easter Weekend Travel
item.description: Fuel prices in Metro Manila generally stayed high and largely unchanged over the Easter weekend as many Filipinos returned to the capital from Holy Week vacations. According to the April 5-6 benchmark...

item.title: ADC Denies David Mark Has Stepped Aside As Party Chairman
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don clear say the news wey dey go round wey talk say former Senate President, David Mark, don step down as their national chairman na lie. Some online publication...

item.title: NHS advises patients to attend appointments amid planned doctors' strike
item.description: The NHS has called on patients not to delay seeking medical care as resident doctors in England begin a six-day strike over pay disputes, starting on Tuesday. The industrial action follows the governm...

item.title: China’s Shanxi miners navigate transition from coal to tourism and new industries
item.description: In Shanxi province, once the powerhouse of China’s coal industry, workers are facing profound changes as the nation shifts towards renewable energy. Retired miner Yang Haiming exemplifies this transfo...

item.title: Iranian drone attacks hit Kuwait oil facilities amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Iranian drones have targeted Kuwait’s oil and government infrastructure, causing substantial damage to petrochemical plants and other facilities. These attacks come amid escalating tensions in the Mid...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens Economy and Reduces Spending Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Dodoma – Facing rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, Tanzania's government has introduced a strategy to safeguard the national economy. Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba told Parliament th...

item.title: US conducts rescue mission for downed pilots in Iran after jet was hit
item.description: The United States successfully carried out a high-risk mission in Iran to rescue two pilots whose F-15E Strike Eagle fighter jet was shot down. According to reports, one pilot was recovered soon after...

item.title: Western Cape allocates R15 million for improvements to Newlands and Boland Park ahead of 2027 Cricket World Cup
item.description: The Western Cape Government has pledged R15 million to upgrade two major cricket venues — Newlands Cricket Ground in Cape Town and Boland Park in Paarl — ahead of the ICC Men’s Cricket World Cup sched...

item.title: Looking Back at the Cast of 2018's Popular Series 'Precious Hearts Romances presents Araw Gabi'
item.description: ABS-CBN revisits the beloved 2018 television series 'Precious Hearts Romances presents Araw Gabi,' which captured the hearts of Filipino audiences with its compelling storytelling and memorable perfor...

item.title: PM Modi criticises TMC government in Bengal over Malda incident involving judicial officers during electoral roll revision
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed a BJP election rally in Cooch Behar, West Bengal, and strongly criticised the Trinamool Congress (TMC) government for the deteriorating law and order situation i...
